description: You are a foodborne disease epidemiologist at a state health department working with CDC FoodNet surveillance data. Using the Salmonella surveillance dataset at C:\Users\Docker\salmonella_surveillance.mdb (table: SalmonellaCases), prepare an annual surveillance report. Analyze the distribution of cases by Serotype, State, AgeGroup, and Sex. Calculate average incidence rates by State and compare case counts across the most common serotypes. Perform a trend analysis for cases from 2015 onwards. Identify which serotype-state combinations have the highest burden. Save the complete analysis report to C:\Users\Docker\salmonella_surveillance_report.html and export a serotype-by-state summary table to C:\Users\Docker\salmonella_serotype_summary.csv.

metadata.data_source: CDC FoodNet Annual Summary Data (real surveillance data)
